channel.title: 1200km Security Research
channel.description: CTI-to-detection research, AdversaryGraph updates, malware analysis, detection engineering, security labs, and analyst tooling by Andrey Pautov.

item.title: Newest Detection Engineering Techniques
item.description: Practical detection engineering techniques for validated telemetry, identity, cloud, SaaS, CI/CD, runtime, data lake, and AI-agent environments.

item.title: Embedded Systems, Hardware, and Firmware Attack Surface CTI
item.description: Source-verified CTI research on embedded systems, edge appliances, BMC, UEFI, firmware, SOHO routers, OT/IoT devices, and hardware trust boundaries.

item.title: AdversaryGraph v4 AI CTI Platform Capability Map
item.description: AdversaryGraph capability map for ATT&CK mapping, IOC enrichment, STIX/TAXII/MISP workflows, Sigma/YARA, malware analysis, and asset surface mapping.

item.title: From Log to Report with AdversaryGraph
item.description: A practical AdversaryGraph workflow from firewall and EDR telemetry to IOC extraction, enrichment, relationship graph review, ATT&CK leads, and an AI-assisted report.
